title: floerkea alba
intro: Floerkea alba, also known as the sensitive plant or threadstem, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the family Linnaceae. It is native to North America and is often found in moist environments, such as near streams or in wet meadows. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. Floerkea alba has been traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being.
